title: Decent Textures
description:
Minecraft texture's suck?

-Yes, so I Improved them (some).
body:
This project was made for a better representation of some items, or blocks that require a rework on it's textures, such as the old minecraft shears.

Also this mod changes some textures as well of the "Alex's Cave's" mod, and maybe (probably not) other mods in the future...
